vocab.meaning: sự tò mò về thực vật
vocab.example: My botanical curiosity was sparked at age seven when I tried to grow a bonsai tree from a tiny cutting.

vocab.meaning: các loại cây lâu năm có sức sống tốt
vocab.example: I started with hardy perennials because they could survive my lack of experience and still bloom year after year.
I used to be fascinated by the photosynthetic process, watching how my sunflowers always turned their faces toward the sun.

vocab.meaning: một nơi trú ẩn xanh tươi
vocab.example: The small patch of jasmine I planted eventually turned our backyard into a verdant sanctuary filled with sweet scents.
My grandfather showed me how to mix compost to create nutrient-rich soil for the tomatoes I was growing.
I chose to grow orchids not for their fruit, but for their incredible aesthetic appeal and vibrant colors.

vocab.meaning: sự phô diễn của hoa/cảnh tượng đầy hoa
vocab.example: The most rewarding moment was when my rose bushes finally matured and put on a magnificent floral display.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng khả năng trồng cây giỏi
vocab.example: Growing herbs like basil and mint as a child helped me cultivate a green thumb that I still use today.
I was drawn to lavender primarily because of its calming aromatic properties.

vocab.meaning: mang lại một vụ mùa/thu hoạch
vocab.example: It took months of patience, but the chili plants I tended finally began to yield a bountiful harvest.
